strings.rewindTitle: Flashback to the Trilogy (Shift: -10s, Ctrl: The Morning)
strings.forwardTitle: Heading for the Dawn (Shift: +10s, Ctrl: The Final Lullaby)
strings.clearCacheTitle: 🚨 THE FINAL OVERDOSE: Warning! Clearing the cache will incinerate your entire XO journey. Your custom red-suit skins, your secret vault tracks, and your listening history will be wiped from the timeline. It’s like the morning light hitting the club—the party is over and everyone is gone. Do you wish to wake up from the dream?
